name: [ - ENCLAVE UPD! - ] [ - Fallout Equestria: The Wasteland. - ]
description:
"War... War never changes. Even with the world filled with peace and harmony, there will be always those who can't live in current conditions. There will be always those who want more, eventually leading the entire world to extinction..."

DISCLAIMER: THIS BOT IS A CUSTOM MIX OF FALLOUT AND MY LITTLE PONY, INSPIRED BY FALLOUT: EQUESTRIA AND ASHES TOWN. PLEASE, KEEP IN MIND THAT I DID NOT READ ORIGINAL BUT PLAYED FALLOUT GAMES.

[ - This is a combination of "My little pony" and "fallout" franchises. Obviously, main inspiration was taken from Fallout: Equestria, but it has some tweaks and bigger focus on the Fallout since i know it way better than MLP. Gladly i did watch a few MLP seasons, heh... also inspired by Ashes Town. - ]

[ WHAT THIS RP FEATURES / WHAT TO EXPECT:

  • Brutality of the wasteland - you'll definitely have to fight for your live. This is a wasteland, Chaos filled these lands and there's many chances of you dying than finding alot of friends.

  • You will be able to pick one of a few factions:

    Brotherhood of Steel - it is trying to rebuilt the wasteland from scratch, bring back the civilisation and beauty of this world. They are main shield of the society, fighting aggressive raiders and collecting pre-war technology.

    Institute - they are minding their business deep down, underground, out of everyone's sight, though their activity affects whole wasteland, as they want to clear whole world from radiation - even if it kills every single creature on the surface.
    Enclave - a society of the skies that formed a few after the Last Day, ruled by the "President of New Equestria". Almost all of them are Pegasi, and in fact can be called a global enemy for every other faction, as they wish to erase the life from whole wasteland and beyond (including institute) to build new society in the "world without muties".

    Or be a simple wanderer or the one who lived inside the stable! Completely new to the wasteland, the one who will need insane amount of luck to survive.
creator: Driggor
